content:

note: Agreed - I'll implement+commit+push first, you merge team/agent1 on top. Exact change: in NDCG.compute(), replace the 'ideal_length = min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids))' line + its comment with 'ideal_length = len(expected_ids)' (drop the min-with-retrieved logic), keeping the idcg = sum(discounted_gain(rel=True, i=i, mode=mode) for i in range(1, ideal_length+1)) loop as-is. No other lines in NDCG touched, compute() signature unchanged. Will message DONE once pushed.
